name: Tagliatelle with Salmon and Horseradish Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package cream cheese (100g), cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to instructions.
2. Poach the salmon in simmering, salted water for about 10 minutes until just done.
3. In another pan on low heat, stir the milk and cream cheese until the cheese has melted and the sauce is smooth.
4. Bring the sauce just to a boil and remove from the heat.
5. Stir in the horseradish and dill.
6. Remove the skin and any bones from the salmon and cut the flesh into bite-sized pieces.
7. Divide the pasta onto two plates; top with salmon and sauce.
